episodes.title: Do the Epstein files show he was working for Russia or another intelligence agency?
episodes.description:
Do the Epstein files show he was working for Russia or another intelligence agency?

From internet users to US lawmakers, speculation abounds regarding convicted sex offender Jeffrey Epstein's ties to intelligence agencies. Questions about his links to Russian elites have come to the forefront following the release of the latest batch of files. 

READ MORE : http://www.euronews.com/2026/03/03/do-the-epstein-files-show-he-was-working-for-russia-or-another-intelligence-agency

episodes.title: British police arrest former UK ambassador Peter Mandelson in probe into Epstein ties
episodes.description:
British police arrest former UK ambassador Peter Mandelson in probe into Epstein ties

Earlier this month, British police opened an investigation into Mandelson after the latest release of the Epstein files by the US Department of Justice.

episodes.title: UK's Starmer apologises to Epstein victims over Mandelson's ambassador appointment
episodes.description:
UK's Starmer apologises to Epstein victims over Mandelson's ambassador appointment

The British prime minister faces intense pressure over the appointment after newly released documents revealed further details of Mandelson's ties to Epstein, pointing to a closer relationship than Mandelson had previously disclosed.

READ MORE : http://www.euronews.com/2026/02/05/uks-starmer-apologises-to-epstein-victims-over-mandelsons-ambassador-appointment

episodes.title: Epstein emails reveal 2001 request for 'inappropriate friends' at Balmoral
episodes.description:
Epstein emails reveal 2001 request for 'inappropriate friends' at Balmoral

Newly released emails show someone using the alias "A" writing from the royal family's Scottish estate in 2001, asking convicted sex trafficker Ghislaine Maxwell for "inappropriate friends". 

READ MORE : http://www.euronews.com/2025/12/23/epstein-emails-reveal-2001-request-for-inappropriate-friends-at-balmoral

episodes.title: Dozens of Epstein files have disappeared from government website
episodes.description:
Dozens of Epstein files have disappeared from government website

One of the files that no longer appears on the US Department of Justice's website includes a photograph of United States President Donald Trump.
